command_probes.name: mini_swe_agent_help
command_probes.stdout_excerpt:
usage: bench_mini_swe_agent.py [-h] [--bench BENCH] [--experiment EXPERIMENT]
                               [--config CONFIG] [--agent-config AGENT_CONFIG]
                               [--baseline-agent-config BASELINE_AGENT_CONFIG]
                               [--logs-dir LOGS_DIR] [--output OUTPUT]
                               [--workers WORKERS] [--run-head RUN_HEAD]
                               [--filter FILTER] [--redo-existing]
                               [--no-fastcontext]

Benchmark mini-swe-agent + fastcontext on SWE-bench

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
  --bench BENCH         Benchmark dataset name or path to JSONL file
  --experiment EXPERIMENT
                        Experiment name
  --config CONFIG       Path to model config .env file (main agent +
                        fastcontext)
  --agent-config AGENT_CONFIG
                        Path to mini-swe-agent YAML config. Defaults to a
                        bundled prompts/*.yaml config
  --baseline-agent-config BASELINE_AGENT_CONFIG
                        Path to mini-swe-agent YAML config used with --no-
                        fastcontext
  --logs-dir LOGS_DIR...

command_probes.name: swebench_fastcontext_help
command_probes.stdout_excerpt:
usage: bench_fastcontext.py [-h] [--bench BENCH] [--experiment EXPERIMENT]
                            [--num-threads NUM_THREADS] [--run-head RUN_HEAD]
                            [--prediction-file PREDICTION_FILE]
                            [--local-mount-dir LOCAL_MOUNT_DIR] [--iid IID]

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
  --bench BENCH
  --experiment EXPERIMENT
  --num-threads NUM_THREADS
  --run-head RUN_HEAD
  --prediction-file PREDICTION_FILE
  --local-mount-dir LOCAL_MOUNT_DIR
  --iid IID

command_probes.name: run_score_import
command_probes.command: uv run --group benchmark python -c 'import sys; sys.path.insert(0, '"'"'benchmark/evaluation'"'"'); import run_score; print('"'"'run_score import ok'"'"')'

dataset_probes.name: swebench-verified
dataset_probes.command: uv run --group benchmark python -c 'import json; from datasets import load_dataset; sample = load_dataset('"'"'princeton-nlp/SWE-Bench_Verified'"'"', split='"'"'test[:1]'"'"'); first = sample[0].get('"'"'instance_id'"'"') if len(sample) else None; print(json.dumps({'"'"'sample_count'"'"': len(sample), '"'"'first_instance_id'"'"': first}))'
dataset_probes.stderr_excerpt: Warning: You are sending unauthenticated requests to the HF Hub. Please set a HF_TOKEN to enable higher rate limits and faster downloads.

official_commands: uv run --group benchmark python benchmark/evaluation/bench_mini_swe_agent.py --bench swebench-multilingual --agent-config prompts/gpt-multi-fc.yaml --config .env --output preds.json --logs-dir logs --workers 1
